Container.Name: Stillwater
Container.Overview: Artist metadata and image management for Emby, Jellyfin, and Kodi. Manage NFO files, artwork, and metadata across your media library.
Container.Description: Stillwater is a self-hosted web application for managing artist and composer metadata across media streaming platforms. It handles NFO files, artist artwork, and metadata for Emby, Jellyfin, and Kodi libraries. Features include rule-based metadata management, multi-platform publishing, image cropping and comparison, and a web UI built with HTMX.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Path to your music library. Maps to /music inside the container.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Default 99 maps to nobody on Unraid.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Default 100 maps to users on Unraid.

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: AES-256 encryption key for API secrets stored at rest. Auto-generated on first run if left blank. Set an explicit value to preserve access to stored secrets across container recreations.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: info, debug, warn, or error.

Config.Name: Log Format
Config.Description: Log output format: json or text.

Config.Name: Base Path
Config.Description: URL prefix for subfolder reverse proxy deployments, for example /stillwater. Leave blank for root deployments.
